Brand portal

Colour system

A night sky with a beacon.

Our palette pairs a deep, credible night sky with one warm signature accent. It is practical, distinctive and built for accessible communication.

Orbit Navy#0B1026Primary field
Beacon Amber#E2672ASignature accent
Civic Violet#5B2A86Partners & community
Steel Silver#C9CED6Lines & structure
Paper White#F4F2EDLight canvas
Ink#14172BReading text

Colour usage

Make contrast do the work.

Orbit Navy is our dominant field; Beacon Amber is deliberately scarce and should lead attention, not fill a page. Keep body copy in Ink on Paper White wherever possible.

✓

Primary pairings

Paper White on Orbit Navy, Ink on Paper White, and Paper White on Civic Violet form the core accessible combinations.

×

Avoid low contrast

Do not set body copy in Steel Silver, or use Beacon Amber for small text on light backgrounds.

LEICESTER
SPACE WEEK

A shared visual language for an ambitious city of science, discovery and collaboration.

Brand guidelines · v1.0 · 2026
